Ad Text:
About the role

We're hiring an AI Engineer to build and deploy intelligent systems on Azure. You'll work across the full lifecycle from designing AI pipelines to shipping production ready features, using Azure's core AI toolset.

This is a hands on engineering role, not a research position. You'll write real code, deploy models, and work closely with product and data teams to solve problems that matter.

Australian work rights are required for this position.

What you'll be working with

Azure AI Studio, Azure AI Foundry, Azure Functions, Azure OpenAI Service, Azure Machine Learning, and Azure AI Search. Experience with RAG architectures, prompt engineering, and serverless pipelines is what we're after.

Day to day you'll be

Building and deploying AI features using Azure AI Studio and Azure AI Foundry

Writing serverless inference pipelines with Azure Functions

Designing RAG systems using Azure AI Search and OpenAI embeddings

Managing model deployments through Azure ML, including versioning and CI/CD

Monitoring production models and iterating based on real usage data

What we're looking for

3+ years in software engineering with at least 18 months shipping AI or ML systems in production

Solid experience with Azure AI services like AI Studio, AI Foundry, or Azure OpenAI

Strong Python skills and comfort with the Azure SDK

Familiarity with MLOps, infrastructure-as-code (Bicep or Terraform), and Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions

A practical understanding of LLMs, fine-tuning, RAG, prompt engineering, evaluation

Why join us

Competitive salary, flexible working, a learning budget for Azure certifications and conferences, and a team that actually ships things.

To apply

Send your CV and a short note on a project you're proud of .
